name: Shanghai Metersbonwe Fashion and Accessories Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Metersbonwe Fashion and Accessories Co., Ltd. researches, designs, develops, produces, and distributes casual wear products in the People's Republic of China. The company is also involved in the franchisee distribution activity. It offers its products under the Metersbonwe, ME&CITY, MooMmoo, Me&City Kids, and CH'IN brand names. The company was founded in 1933 and is based in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China. Shanghai Metersbonwe Fashion and Accessories Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Shanghai Huafu Investment Ltd.
